nasb.text: Cursed be the man who brought the news To my father, saying, “A baby boy has been born to you!” And made him very happy.

esv.text: Cursed be the man who brought the news to my father, “A son is born to you,” making him very glad.

cnv.text: 那向我父親報喜信： “你得了一個男孩”，叫我父親十分高興的， 願那人受咒詛！

ccb.text: 愿那告诉我父亲喜得贵子、 使他欢喜的人受咒诅！
